---
title: "The Hon. John Reginald Upton Colborne, 3rd Lord Seaton"
---

## The Hon. John Reginald Upton Colborne, 3rd Lord Seaton

**Dates:** (1854-1933)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Grandson of the 1st Lord Seaton, he succeeded his father as 3rd Lord Seaton 1888.  He assumed  the additional surnames Fuller-Elliott-Drake after marrying the heiress of that family.

### Letters

- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from Feb 17th [1885] 
- Letter from January 19, 1869
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
